field.label: Enabled
field.help: Enable Kea to Unbound DNS registration. When enabled, DNS UPDATE packets from kea-dhcp-ddns are received and translated into Unbound local_data entries.

field.label: Port
field.help: UDP port to listen on for DNS UPDATE packets from kea-dhcp-ddns. Must match the destination port configured in kea-dhcp-ddns. Default 53535.

field.label: TSIG Key Name
field.help: Optional. TSIG key name for authenticating DNS UPDATE packets. If set, kea-dhcp-ddns must be configured to sign updates with the matching key. Leave empty to disable TSIG (safe since the listener only accepts connections from 127.0.0.1).

field.label: TSIG Key Secret
field.help: Base64-encoded HMAC secret matching the key name above. Only used when TSIG Key Name is set.

field.label: Reload Unbound on Kea config change
field.help: When enabled, Unbound is reloaded whenever Kea configuration changes so that updated static reservations become visible in DNS immediately. WARNING: Unbound reload briefly wipes dynamic lease DNS entries (they are automatically restored from the Kea lease database). Only needed if "Register DHCP Static Mappings" is also enabled in Services → Unbound DNS → General.
